mapper.select: SELECT ASSET_TYPE AS assetType, ASSET_TYPE_NM AS assetTypeNm FROM ASSET_TYPE_CD WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT a.ASSET_SEQ, a.FAMILY_ID, a.ASSET_NM, a.ASSET_TYPE, t.ASSET_TYPE_NM, a.LIQUID_YN, a.AMOUNT, a.MEMO, a.EXPECTED_RATE, a.RATE_CYCLE_NUM, a.RATE_CYCLE_UNIT, a.DEL_YN, a.DISPOSE_YN, a.DISPOSE_YMD, a.DISPOSE_REASON, a.REG_ID, a.REG_DT, a.UPD_ID, a.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(a.UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM ASSET_MST a LEFT JOIN ASSET_TYPE_CD t ON a.ASSET_TYPE = t.ASSET_TYPE WHERE a.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND a.ASSET_SEQ = #{assetSeq} AND a.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ASSET_MST ( FAMILY_ID, ASSET_NM, ASSET_TYPE, LIQUID_YN, AMOUNT, MEMO, EXPECTED_RATE, RATE_CYCLE_NUM, RATE_CYCLE_UNIT, DEL_YN, DISPOSE_YN, DISPOSE_YMD, DISPOSE_REASON, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{assetNm}, #{assetType}, #{liquidYn}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{expectedRate}, #{rateCycleNum}, #{rateCycleUnit}, 'N',
#{disposeYn} 'N' , #{disposeYmd}, #{disposeReason}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ASSET_MST SET ASSET_NM = #{assetNm}, ASSET_TYPE = #{assetType}, LIQUID_YN = #{liquidYn}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, MEMO = #{memo}, EXPECTED_RATE = #{expectedRate}, RATE_CYCLE_NUM = #{rateCycleNum}, RATE_CYCLE_UNIT = #{rateCycleUnit}, DISPOSE_YN = #{disposeYn}, DISPOSE_YMD = #{disposeYmd}, DISPOSE_REASON = #{disposeReason}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND ASSET_SEQ = #{assetSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT LOAN_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, LOAN_NM, LOAN_AMOUNT, CURRENT_BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE, LOAN_MONTHS, START_YMD, END_YMD, MEMO, DEL_YN, CLOSE_YN, CLOSE_YMD, CLOSE_REASON, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM LOAN_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND LOAN_SEQ = #{loanSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO LOAN_MST ( FAMILY_ID, LOAN_NM, LOAN_AMOUNT, CURRENT_BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE, LOAN_MONTHS, START_YMD, END_YMD, MEMO, DEL_YN, CLOSE_YN, CLOSE_YMD, CLOSE_REASON, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{familyId}, #{loanNm}, #{loanAmount}, #{currentBalance}, #{interestRate}, #{loanMonths}, #{startYmd}, #{endYmd}, #{memo}, 'N',
#{closeYn} 'N' , #{closeYmd}, #{closeReason}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{updId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE LOAN_MST SET LOAN_NM = #{loanNm}, LOAN_AMOUNT = #{loanAmount}, CURRENT_BALANCE = #{currentBalance}, INTEREST_RATE = #{interestRate}, LOAN_MONTHS = #{loanMonths}, START_YMD = #{startYmd}, END_YMD = #{endYmd}, MEMO = #{memo}, CLOSE_YN = #{closeYn}, CLOSE_YMD = #{closeYmd}, CLOSE_REASON = #{closeReason}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND LOAN_SEQ = #{loanSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT a.ASSET_SEQ, a.FAMILY_ID, a.ASSET_NM, a.ASSET_TYPE, a.LIQUID_YN, a.AMOUNT, a.EXPECTED_RATE, a.RATE_CYCLE_NUM, a.RATE_CYCLE_UNIT, a.DEL_YN, a.DISPOSE_YN FROM ASSET_MST a WHERE a.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND a.DEL_YN = 'N' AND a.DISPOSE_YN = 'N' AND a.EXPECTED_RATE IS NOT NULL AND a.EXPECTED_RATE != 0

SELECT a.ASSET_SEQ, a.FAMILY_ID, a.ASSET_NM, a.ASSET_TYPE, t.ASSET_TYPE_NM, a.LIQUID_YN, a.AMOUNT, a.MEMO, a.DEL_YN, a.DISPOSE_YN, a.DISPOSE_YMD, a.REG_ID, a.UPD_ID, a.UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(a.UPD_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM ASSET_MST a LEFT JOIN ASSET_TYPE_CD t ON a.ASSET_TYPE = t.ASSET_TYPE WHERE a.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND a.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( a.ASSET_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR t.ASSET_TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR a.MEMO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ) ORDER BY a.DISPOSE_YN ASC, a.ASSET_SEQ DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT LOAN_SEQ, FAMILY_ID, LOAN_NM, LOAN_AMOUNT, CURRENT_BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE, LOAN_MONTHS, START_YMD, END_YMD, MEMO, DEL_YN, CLOSE_YN, CLOSE_YMD, CLOSE_REASON, REG_ID, UPD_ID, UPD_DT, DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') AS UPD_DT_STR FROM LOAN_MST WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND ( LOAN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR MEMO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') ) ORDER BY CLOSE_YN ASC, LOAN_SEQ DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT * FROM V_ASSET_TYPE_SUMMARY WHERE FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} ORDER BY TOTAL_AMOUNT DESC

SELECT a.ASSET_SEQ, a.FAMILY_ID, a.ASSET_NM, a.ASSET_TYPE, t.ASSET_TYPE_NM, a.LIQUID_YN, a.AMOUNT, a.DEL_YN, a.DISPOSE_YN FROM ASSET_MST a LEFT JOIN ASSET_TYPE_CD t ON a.ASSET_TYPE = t.ASSET_TYPE WHERE a.FAMILY_ID = #{familyId} AND a.DEL_YN = 'N' AND a.DISPOSE_YN = 'N' AND a.LIQUID_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY a.ASSET_NM
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CASH_FLOW_PLAN_MST WHERE COST_CENTER_TYPE = 'ASSET' AND COST_CENTER_SEQ = #{assetSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
